public/
  fonts/
    Arial.ttf
    Arial-Bold.ttf          ← arialbd.ttf in Windows
    Arial-Italic.ttf        ← ariali.ttf in Windows
    Arial-Bold-Italic.ttf   ← arialbi.ttf in Windows
    Calibri.ttf
    Calibri-Bold.ttf        ← calibrib.ttf in Windows
    OCRB.ttf                ← download free from internet
    RupeeForbidan.ttf       ← you already have this
